SEARCH
Package com.example.myapplication

Class Profiles

java.lang.Object
com.example.myapplication.Profiles
public class Profiles extends Object
Helper class that manages user profile data and Firestore database interactions. Handles device identification, fetching user roles, deleting profiles, and aggregating waitlist counts.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Profiles()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    deleteProfile(String deviceId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnCompleteListener<Void> onComplete)
    Deletes users profile from the collection in the database Removes them from any event waiting list they joined before deleting account
    void
    fetchUserRole(String deviceId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfiles> listener)
    Fetechs user role from database using deviceID then returns the correct profile role If given Admin roles, then the role is changed from Entrant to Admin
    String
    getDeviceId(android.content.Context context)
    Identifies who the user is by the deviceID
    void
    getWaitingListCount(String eventId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Long> onSuccess)
    Waitlist Count Uses query to go through the database to see how many entrants are in the waiting list for the event selected

  • Method Details

    • getDeviceId

      public String getDeviceId(android.content.Context context)
      Identifies who the user is by the deviceID
      Parameters:
      context - app
      Returns:
      id of the device

    • fetchUserRole

      public void fetchUserRole(String deviceId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<UserProfiles> listener)
      Fetechs user role from database using deviceID then returns the correct profile role If given Admin roles, then the role is changed from Entrant to Admin
      Parameters:
      deviceId - id of device (hardware)
      listener - when fetching complete

    • deleteProfile

      public void deleteProfile(String deviceId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnCompleteListener<Void> onComplete)
      Deletes users profile from the collection in the database Removes them from any event waiting list they joined before deleting account
      Parameters:
      deviceId - device id (hardware)
      onComplete - when delete is completed

    • getWaitingListCount

      public void getWaitingListCount(String eventId, com.google.android.gms.tasks.OnSuccessListener<Long> onSuccess)
      Waitlist Count Uses query to go through the database to see how many entrants are in the waiting list for the event selected
      Parameters:
      eventId - id of the event (like device id but for events)
      onSuccess - gives the final count of the users
